raw_text: Extremely disappointed with today's experience. I placed an order of ₹2,200 in the morning, but it arrived without bags. The delivery partner asked me to empty the items from their basket right at the door. I had to return the order and lodge a complaint. Interestingly, after the complaint, the same order is now being delivered with bags. You wasted an hour of my time over something as basic as packaging. Please start thinking about the customer's convenience."
Always applied surcharges, delay in delivery. The app is good to use. items are missing without notification. Not that good of an experience lately.
“Blinkit is great for urgent grocery needs because of its quick delivery service. Sometimes prices are slightly higher and a few items may get cancelled, but overall it’s convenient and reliable.”

Worst customer service. chatbot is not working properly and even the customer care executive was not responding properly or trying to understand the problem and no option for call. Paid twice but still the order was placed as cod so paid thrice and they don't understand that I should get two refunds not one.

this app is superb 👍 anything ordered in this app 🌸 but one problem handling charge are costly and sometimes in this app are not available cash on delivery and high demand surge 😞 but ok ok 👌 blinkit do not this not ignored blinkit but I love this app you can install the app 😊 i 🤔 think good aap but I love it thanks .

I placed an order using this app and added money to the wallet for payment. The rider marked the order as 'delivered' on the app without actually delivering it to me. I received no response from customer care, and I lost my money.

I placed an order from blinkit, but I have not received yet.However the order status is showing delivered which is incorrect. I have already contacted to customer support,but i was informed that the since the system shows item as delivered no further action can be taken This is very disappointing,as I have not received my parcel at all.

Blinkit has completely transformed modern grocery shopping by delivering daily essentials to doorsteps within minutes. Its lightning-fast service saves immense time, making it a reliable lifesaver for last-minute needs and sudden cravings. The mobile application provides a seamless user interface with highly accurate live tracking of the delivery rider. While occasional out-of-stock items can be frustrating, the instant refund policy swiftly resolves most customer complaints. Overall, it remains

I am extremely disappointed with the aquarium filter I purchased from Blinkit. The product stopped working within less than one month of use, which is completely unacceptable. This is one of the worst products I have purchased. I expected better quality and durability, but the item turned out to be defective. I request a proper resolution, either a replacement or refund, at the earliest. Please also review the quality of products being sold on your platform to avoid such poor customer experience

this my first time I was using this app I just buy a type c to 3m5mm converter cable just now I was trying to plug in to my mobile but it's not working i was trying to give feedback and I was trying to replace my product but there is a varitual assistant i was chatting with that they asked video proof I was trying to sending but it's not working. there is no clear customer support service.
Everything about this app is good but the problem is the delivery charge! its way to high if the order amount isn't much! I appreciate their hard work but it should be a little less..

Very disappointing experience. Twice, Blinkit delivered the wrong items in my orders. On top of that, the delivery partner behaved unprofessionally and was rude. I expect accurate deliveries and respectful customer service. This has happened more than once, so I have lost confidence in the service. I hope Blinkit improves its quality control and trains its delivery partners to treat customers properly.

the worst customer service ever ...I ordered a gas stove worth 7000rs...and it didn't fit in my kitchen...and they are not ready to replace it with another model...amazon is the best...I have been harassed by the customer care ,all the ladies on the customer service department they don't know anything....never ever buy anything expensive from this app...beware..ITS NOT UR LAST MINUTE APP,ITS THE WORST STUPID APP EVER MADE....
Best app for daily needs. Other apps don't charge platform or handling fee like Blinkit, but its service is first in class. Switched to blinkit after third class experience in Zepto.

Worst response giving from the side 😤 my money was locked in the blinkit wallet I can't able to order my product from the morning it shows payment method was not available due to technical error but in others device the payment methods was still working... I can't recieved any solutions till now

blinkit doing scam in the name of no return and exchange. They try to sell all unsold bad quality products and finally customer are in loss. beware of ordering any item which has no return or exchange.

Blinkit is a lifesaver for ultra-fast deliveries. The app is incredibly easy to use, and ordered items consistently arrive at my doorstep in under 10 minutes. Their selection is impressive, everything is fresh, and the real-time tracking is spot on. Highly recommended for anyone who values their time!

The delivery time shown at the time of ordering was inaccurate. The order was delivered much later than promised, which was disappointing. Please provide realistic delivery estimates instead of misleading timelines.

Really disappointed with my recent Blinkit experience. I ordered a perfume that was clearly showing a “Buy 1 Get 1 Free” offer, so naturally I expected to receive two perfumes. But after delivery, only one item arrived. When I contacted customer support, they casually said that I was supposed to manually add two quantities to the cart to get the offer.
